# High Pressure And Temperature

**Summary**: Conditions where both pressure and temperature are significantly elevated.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017]] evaluated cement performance under HPHT conditions (292°F, 3000 psi).

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017]] Requires specialized cement chemistry to maintain integrity.
